preconditions: I can only create a transaction case A if it is not the case that A is open and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I create a transaction case A, it is the case that A is open

associate_case_with_origin.description: associate a transaction case A with an originating entity B
preconditions: I can only associate a transaction case A with an originating entity B if it is the case that A is open and the origin is available for B and A is compatible with the originating entity B
I can only associate a transaction case A with an originating entity B if it is not the case that A has an active association
effects: Once I associate a transaction case A with an originating entity B, it is the case that A is linked to the originating entity B and A has an active association
Once I associate a transaction case A with an originating entity B, it is not the case anymore that the origin is available for B

reset_case_associations.description: reset associations for a transaction case A with an originating entity B
preconditions: I can only reset associations for a transaction case A with an originating entity B if it is the case that A is linked to the originating entity B

I can only reset associations for a transaction case A with an originating entity B if it is not the case that the decision for A has been recorded and it is not the case that the approval for A has been assigned
effects: Once I reset associations for a transaction case A with an originating entity B, it is the case that the origin is available for B

Once I reset associations for a transaction case A with an originating entity B, it is not the case anymore that A is linked to the originating entity B and it is not the case anymore that A has an active association and it is not the case anymore that A is on hold and it is not the case anymore that A has completed specialist review and it is not the case anymore that a specialist is required for A and it is not the case anymore that approval has been granted for A and it is not the case anymore that an additional check is required for A

reserve_screening_alert.description: reserve a screening alert B for a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a screening alert B for a transaction case A if it is the case that A is open and the screening alert is available for B
effects: Once I reserve a screening alert B for a transaction case A, it is the case that A has a reserved alert for B
Once I reserve a screening alert B for a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that the screening alert is available for B

release_screening_alert.description: release a screening alert B from a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only release a screening alert B from a transaction case A if it is the case that A has a reserved alert for B
effects: Once I release a screening alert B from a transaction case A, it is the case that the screening alert is available for B
Once I release a screening alert B from a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that A has a reserved alert for B

apply_alert_hold.description: apply alert hold to a transaction case A for a screening alert B
preconditions: I can only apply alert hold to a transaction case A for a screening alert B if it is the case that A is open and A has an active association and A has a reserved alert for B
I can only apply alert hold to a transaction case A for a screening alert B if it is not the case that A is on hold
effects: Once I apply alert hold to a transaction case A for a screening alert B, it is the case that A is on hold

apply_detector_hold.description: apply detector hold to a transaction case A using an automated detector B
preconditions: I can only apply detector hold to a transaction case A using an automated detector B if it is the case that A is open and A has an active association and the detector is available for B
I can only apply detector hold to a transaction case A using an automated detector B if it is not the case that A is on hold
effects: Once I apply detector hold to a transaction case A using an automated detector B, it is the case that A is on hold and a specialist is required for A
Once I apply detector hold to a transaction case A using an automated detector B, it is not the case anymore that the detector is available for B

specialist_capture_evidence.description: specialist a specialist C captures evidence for a transaction case A with a screening alert B
preconditions: I can only specialist a specialist C captures evidence for a transaction case A with a screening alert B if it is the case that A is on hold and A has an active association and A has a reserved alert for B and C is available
I can only specialist a specialist C captures evidence for a transaction case A with a screening alert B if it is not the case that A has completed specialist review
effects: Once I specialist a specialist C captures evidence for a transaction case A with a screening alert B, it is the case that A has completed specialist review
Once I specialist a specialist C captures evidence for a transaction case A with a screening alert B, it is not the case anymore that a specialist is required for A

specialist_capture_evidence_via_approver.description: specialist captures evidence for a transaction case A via an approver role B
preconditions: I can only specialist captures evidence for a transaction case A via an approver role B if it is the case that A has an active association and A is confirmed by the approver role B
I can only specialist captures evidence for a transaction case A via an approver role B if it is not the case that A has completed specialist review
effects: Once I specialist captures evidence for a transaction case A via an approver role B, it is the case that A has completed specialist review
Once I specialist captures evidence for a transaction case A via an approver role B, it is not the case anymore that a specialist is required for A

bind_customer_profile.description: bind a transaction case A to a customer profile B
preconditions: I can only bind a transaction case A to a customer profile B if it is the case that A is open and the customer profile is available for B and A is compatible with the customer profile B
effects: Once I bind a transaction case A to a customer profile B, it is the case that A is bound to the customer profile B
Once I bind a transaction case A to a customer profile B, it is not the case anymore that the customer profile is available for B

release_customer_profile.description: release a customer profile B from a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only release a customer profile B from a transaction case A if it is the case that A is bound to the customer profile B
effects: Once I release a customer profile B from a transaction case A, it is the case that the customer profile is available for B
Once I release a customer profile B from a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the customer profile B

bind_limit_rule.description: bind a limit rule B to a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only bind a limit rule B to a transaction case A if it is the case that A is open and the limit rule is available for B and A is compatible with the limit rule B
effects: Once I bind a limit rule B to a transaction case A, it is the case that A is bound to the limit rule B
Once I bind a limit rule B to a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that the limit rule is available for B

release_limit_rule.description: release a limit rule B from a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only release a limit rule B from a transaction case A if it is the case that A is bound to the limit rule B
effects: Once I release a limit rule B from a transaction case A, it is the case that the limit rule is available for B
Once I release a limit rule B from a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the limit rule B

bind_product_profile.description: bind a product profile B to a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only bind a product profile B to a transaction case A if it is the case that A is open and the product profile is available for B and A is compatible with the product profile B
effects: Once I bind a product profile B to a transaction case A, it is the case that A is bound to the product profile B
Once I bind a product profile B to a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that the product profile is available for B

release_product_profile.description: release a product profile B from a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only release a product profile B from a transaction case A if it is the case that A is bound to the product profile B
effects: Once I release a product profile B from a transaction case A, it is the case that the product profile is available for B
Once I release a product profile B from a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the product profile B

bind_risk_indicator.description: bind a risk indicator B to a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only bind a risk indicator B to a transaction case A if it is the case that A is open and B is available and A is compatible with the risk indicator B
effects: Once I bind a risk indicator B to a transaction case A, it is the case that A is bound to the risk indicator B
Once I bind a risk indicator B to a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_risk_indicator.description: release a risk indicator B from a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only release a risk indicator B from a transaction case A if it is the case that A is bound to the risk indicator B
effects: Once I release a risk indicator B from a transaction case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a risk indicator B from a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that A is bound to the risk indicator B

perform_risk_assessment.description: perform risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a customer profile C, and a limit rule D
preconditions: I can only perform risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a customer profile C, and a limit rule D if it is the case that A has an active association and A is bound to the customer profile C and A is bound to the limit rule D and the profile is available for B and A is compatible with the transaction profile B
I can only perform risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a customer profile C, and a limit rule D if it is not the case that the decision for A has been recorded
effects: Once I perform risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a customer profile C, and a limit rule D, it is the case that A has a decision flag for the transaction profile B and the decision for A has been recorded
Once I perform risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a customer profile C, and a limit rule D, it is not the case anymore that the profile is available for B

perform_extended_risk_assessment.description: perform extended risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a product profile C, and an evidence document D
preconditions: I can only perform extended risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a product profile C, and an evidence document D if it is the case that A has an active association and A is bound to the product profile C and D is available and the profile is available for B and A is compatible with the transaction profile B and A is compatible with the evidence document D

I can only perform extended risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a product profile C, and an evidence document D if it is not the case that the decision for A has been recorded
effects: Once I perform extended risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a product profile C, and an evidence document D, it is the case that A has a decision flag for the transaction profile B and the decision for A has been recorded and an additional check is required for A and a specialist is required for A

Once I perform extended risk assessment on a transaction case A using a transaction profile B, a product profile C, and an evidence document D, it is not the case anymore that the profile is available for B and it is not the case anymore that D is available

clear_additional_checks.description: clear additional checks for a transaction case A using a customer profile B and a limit rule C
preconditions: I can only clear additional checks for a transaction case A using a customer profile B and a limit rule C if it is the case that the decision for A has been recorded and an additional check is required for A and A is bound to the customer profile B and A is bound to the limit rule C
effects: Once I clear additional checks for a transaction case A using a customer profile B and a limit rule C, it is not the case anymore that an additional check is required for A and it is not the case anymore that a specialist is required for A

allocate_approver.description: allocate approver for a transaction case A using a customer profile B, a limit rule C, and an escalation channel D
preconditions: I can only allocate approver for a transaction case A using a customer profile B, a limit rule C, and an escalation channel D if it is the case that A has completed specialist review and the decision for A has been recorded and A is bound to the customer profile B and A is bound to the limit rule C and A is bound to the auxiliary object D

I can only allocate approver for a transaction case A using a customer profile B, a limit rule C, and an escalation channel D if it is not the case that a specialist is required for A and it is not the case that the approval for A has been assigned
effects: Once I allocate approver for a transaction case A using a customer profile B, a limit rule C, and an escalation channel D, it is the case that the approval for A has been assigned

allocate_escalation_approver.description: allocate escalation approver for a transaction case A using a product profile B, a risk indicator C, and an escalation channel secondary D
preconditions: I can only allocate escalation approver for a transaction case A using a product profile B, a risk indicator C, and an escalation channel secondary D if it is the case that A has completed specialist review and the decision for A has been recorded and A is bound to the product profile B and A is bound to the risk indicator C and A is bound to the auxiliary object D

I can only allocate escalation approver for a transaction case A using a product profile B, a risk indicator C, and an escalation channel secondary D if it is not the case that the approval for A has been assigned
effects: Once I allocate escalation approver for a transaction case A using a product profile B, a risk indicator C, and an escalation channel secondary D, it is the case that the approval for A has been assigned and a specialist is required for A

finalize_approval_stage.description: finalize approval stage for a transaction case A with a customer profile B and a limit rule C
preconditions: I can only finalize approval stage for a transaction case A with a customer profile B and a limit rule C if it is the case that the approval for A has been assigned and a specialist is required for A and A is bound to the customer profile B and A is bound to the limit rule C
effects: Once I finalize approval stage for a transaction case A with a customer profile B and a limit rule C, it is the case that approval has been granted for A

Once I finalize approval stage for a transaction case A with a customer profile B and a limit rule C, it is not the case anymore that a specialist is required for A and it is not the case anymore that A has completed specialist review and it is not the case anymore that an additional check is required for A

reassign_specialist_review.description: reassign specialist review for a transaction case A with a screening alert B to a specialist C
preconditions: I can only reassign specialist review for a transaction case A with a screening alert B to a specialist C if it is the case that approval has been granted for A and the approval for A has been assigned and A has an active association and A has a reserved alert for B and C is available
I can only reassign specialist review for a transaction case A with a screening alert B to a specialist C if it is not the case that A has completed specialist review
effects: Once I reassign specialist review for a transaction case A with a screening alert B to a specialist C, it is the case that A has completed specialist review

mark_escalation_ready.description: mark a transaction case A with a screening alert B as escalation ready
preconditions: I can only mark a transaction case A with a screening alert B as escalation ready if it is the case that the approval for A has been assigned and A has completed specialist review and A has a reserved alert for B
I can only mark a transaction case A with a screening alert B as escalation ready if it is not the case that a specialist is required for A and it is not the case that the approver is ready for A
effects: Once I mark a transaction case A with a screening alert B as escalation ready, it is the case that the approver is ready for A

mark_escalation_ready_with_detector.description: mark a transaction case A as escalation ready using an automated detector B
preconditions: I can only mark a transaction case A as escalation ready using an automated detector B if it is the case that the approval for A has been assigned and A has completed specialist review and the detector is available for B

I can only mark a transaction case A as escalation ready using an automated detector B if it is not the case that a specialist is required for A and it is not the case that the approver is ready for A
effects: Once I mark a transaction case A as escalation ready using an automated detector B, it is the case that the approver is ready for A
Once I mark a transaction case A as escalation ready using an automated detector B, it is not the case anymore that the detector is available for B

assign_approver_role_to_case.description: assign an approver role B to a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only assign an approver role B to a transaction case A if it is the case that the approver is ready for A and the approver role is available for B and the primary approver role for A is compatible with B
effects: Once I assign an approver role B to a transaction case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the transaction case A
Once I assign an approver role B to a transaction case A, it is not the case anymore that the approver role is available for B

confirm_approver_assignment.description: confirm assignment of an approver role C to a case subtype secondary A for a case subtype primary B
preconditions: I can only confirm assignment of an approver role C to a case subtype secondary A for a case subtype primary B if it is the case that A is open and A is eligible for secondary closure and A has secondary compatibility with the approver role C and C is assigned to the transaction case B
I can only confirm assignment of an approver role C to a case subtype secondary A for a case subtype primary B if it is not the case that A is confirmed by the approver role C
effects: Once I confirm assignment of an approver role C to a case subtype secondary A for a case subtype primary B, it is the case that A is confirmed by the approver role C

create_escalation_ticket.description: create escalation ticket for a transaction case A with a screening alert B by a specialist C
preconditions: I can only create escalation ticket for a transaction case A with a screening alert B by a specialist C if it is the case that A is open and A is eligible for secondary closure and A has completed specialist review and the approver is ready for A and A has a reserved alert for B and C is available
I can only create escalation ticket for a transaction case A with a screening alert B by a specialist C if it is not the case that an escalation ticket is created for A
effects: Once I create escalation ticket for a transaction case A with a screening alert B by a specialist C, it is the case that an escalation ticket is created for A

close_case_primary.description: close case primary for a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only close case primary for a transaction case A if it is the case that A is eligible for primary closure and A is open and A has an active association and the decision for A has been recorded and the approval for A has been assigned and the approver is ready for A and A has completed specialist review
I can only close case primary for a transaction case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close case primary for a transaction case A, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_approver.description: close case with approver for a transaction case A confirmed by an approver role B
preconditions: I can only close case with approver for a transaction case A confirmed by an approver role B if it is the case that A is eligible for secondary closure and A is open and A has an active association and the decision for A has been recorded and the approval for A has been assigned and the approver is ready for A and A has completed specialist review and A is confirmed by the approver role B
I can only close case with approver for a transaction case A confirmed by an approver role B if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close case with approver for a transaction case A confirmed by an approver role B, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_escalation.description: close case with escalation for a transaction case A
preconditions: I can only close case with escalation for a transaction case A if it is the case that A is eligible for secondary closure and A is open and A has an active association and the decision for A has been recorded and the approval for A has been assigned and the approver is ready for A and A has completed specialist review and an escalation ticket is created for A
I can only close case with escalation for a transaction case A if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close case with escalation for a transaction case A, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.associate_case_with_origin: associate transaction case {?transaction_case} with originating entity {?originating_entity}
action_nl_templates.reset_case_associations: reset associations for transaction case {?transaction_case} with originating entity {?originating_entity}
action_nl_templates.reserve_screening_alert: reserve screening alert {?screening_alert} for transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.release_screening_alert: release screening alert {?screening_alert} from transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.apply_alert_hold: apply alert hold to transaction case {?transaction_case} for screening alert {?screening_alert}
action_nl_templates.apply_detector_hold: apply detector hold to transaction case {?transaction_case} using automated detector {?automated_detector}
action_nl_templates.specialist_capture_evidence: specialist specialist {?specialist} captures evidence for transaction case {?transaction_case} with screening alert {?screening_alert}
action_nl_templates.specialist_capture_evidence_via_approver: specialist captures evidence for transaction case {?transaction_case} via approver role {?approver_role}
action_nl_templates.bind_customer_profile: bind transaction case {?transaction_case} to customer profile {?customer_profile}
action_nl_templates.release_customer_profile: release customer profile {?customer_profile} from transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.bind_limit_rule: bind limit rule {?limit_rule} to transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.release_limit_rule: release limit rule {?limit_rule} from transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.bind_product_profile: bind product profile {?product_profile} to transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.release_product_profile: release product profile {?product_profile} from transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.bind_risk_indicator: bind risk indicator {?risk_indicator} to transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.release_risk_indicator: release risk indicator {?risk_indicator} from transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.perform_risk_assessment: perform risk assessment on transaction case {?transaction_case} using transaction profile {?transaction_profile}, customer profile {?customer_profile}, and limit rule {?limit_rule}
action_nl_templates.perform_extended_risk_assessment: perform extended risk assessment on transaction case {?transaction_case} using transaction profile {?transaction_profile}, product profile {?product_profile}, and evidence document {?evidence_document}
action_nl_templates.clear_additional_checks: clear additional checks for transaction case {?transaction_case} using customer profile {?customer_profile} and limit rule {?limit_rule}
action_nl_templates.allocate_approver: allocate approver for transaction case {?transaction_case} using customer profile {?customer_profile}, limit rule {?limit_rule}, and escalation channel {?escalation_channel}
action_nl_templates.allocate_escalation_approver: allocate escalation approver for transaction case {?transaction_case} using product profile {?product_profile}, risk indicator {?risk_indicator}, and escalation channel secondary {?escalation_channel_secondary}
action_nl_templates.finalize_approval_stage: finalize approval stage for transaction case {?transaction_case} with customer profile {?customer_profile} and limit rule {?limit_rule}
action_nl_templates.reassign_specialist_review: reassign specialist review for transaction case {?transaction_case} with screening alert {?screening_alert} to specialist {?specialist}
action_nl_templates.mark_escalation_ready: mark transaction case {?transaction_case} with screening alert {?screening_alert} as escalation ready
action_nl_templates.mark_escalation_ready_with_detector: mark transaction case {?transaction_case} as escalation ready using automated detector {?automated_detector}
action_nl_templates.assign_approver_role_to_case: assign approver role {?approver_role} to transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.confirm_approver_assignment: confirm assignment of approver role {?approver_role} to case subtype secondary {?case_subtype_secondary} for case subtype primary {?case_subtype_primary}
action_nl_templates.create_escalation_ticket: create escalation ticket for transaction case {?transaction_case} with screening alert {?screening_alert} by specialist {?specialist}
action_nl_templates.close_case_primary: close case primary for transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_approver: close case with approver for transaction case {?transaction_case} confirmed by approver role {?approver_role}
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_escalation: close case with escalation for transaction case {?transaction_case}

action_nl_templates_indef.associate_case_with_origin: associate a transaction case {?transaction_case} with an originating entity {?originating_entity}
action_nl_templates_indef.reset_case_associations: reset associations for a transaction case {?transaction_case} with an originating entity {?originating_entity}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_screening_alert: reserve a screening alert {?screening_alert} for a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_screening_alert: release a screening alert {?screening_alert} from a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_alert_hold: apply alert hold to a transaction case {?transaction_case} for a screening alert {?screening_alert}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_detector_hold: apply detector hold to a transaction case {?transaction_case} using an automated detector {?automated_detector}

action_nl_templates_indef.specialist_capture_evidence_via_approver: specialist captures evidence for a transaction case {?transaction_case} via an approver role {?approver_role}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_customer_profile: bind a transaction case {?transaction_case} to a customer profile {?customer_profile}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_customer_profile: release a customer profile {?customer_profile} from a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_limit_rule: bind a limit rule {?limit_rule} to a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_limit_rule: release a limit rule {?limit_rule} from a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_product_profile: bind a product profile {?product_profile} to a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_product_profile: release a product profile {?product_profile} from a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.bind_risk_indicator: bind a risk indicator {?risk_indicator} to a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_risk_indicator: release a risk indicator {?risk_indicator} from a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_risk_assessment: perform risk assessment on a transaction case {?transaction_case} using a transaction profile {?transaction_profile}, a customer profile {?customer_profile}, and a limit rule {?limit_rule}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_extended_risk_assessment: perform extended risk assessment on a transaction case {?transaction_case} using a transaction profile {?transaction_profile}, a product profile {?product_profile}, and an evidence document {?evidence_document}
action_nl_templates_indef.clear_additional_checks: clear additional checks for a transaction case {?transaction_case} using a customer profile {?customer_profile} and a limit rule {?limit_rule}
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_approver: allocate approver for a transaction case {?transaction_case} using a customer profile {?customer_profile}, a limit rule {?limit_rule}, and an escalation channel {?escalation_channel}
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_escalation_approver: allocate escalation approver for a transaction case {?transaction_case} using a product profile {?product_profile}, a risk indicator {?risk_indicator}, and an escalation channel secondary {?escalation_channel_secondary}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_approval_stage: finalize approval stage for a transaction case {?transaction_case} with a customer profile {?customer_profile} and a limit rule {?limit_rule}
action_nl_templates_indef.reassign_specialist_review: reassign specialist review for a transaction case {?transaction_case} with a screening alert {?screening_alert} to a specialist {?specialist}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_escalation_ready: mark a transaction case {?transaction_case} with a screening alert {?screening_alert} as escalation ready
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_escalation_ready_with_detector: mark a transaction case {?transaction_case} as escalation ready using an automated detector {?automated_detector}
action_nl_templates_indef.assign_approver_role_to_case: assign an approver role {?approver_role} to a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_approver_assignment: confirm assignment of an approver role {?approver_role} to a case subtype secondary {?case_subtype_secondary} for a case subtype primary {?case_subtype_primary}
action_nl_templates_indef.create_escalation_ticket: create escalation ticket for a transaction case {?transaction_case} with a screening alert {?screening_alert} by a specialist {?specialist}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_primary: close case primary for a transaction case {?transaction_case}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_approver: close case with approver for a transaction case {?transaction_case} confirmed by an approver role {?approver_role}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_escalation: close case with escalation for a transaction case {?transaction_case}

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a transaction case or a originating entity or a transaction profile or a limit rule or a customer profile or a product profile or a screening alert or a automated detector or a approver role or a specialist or a evidence document or a risk indicator or a auxiliary object is also a object
Everything that is a escalation channel or a escalation channel secondary is also a auxiliary object
Everything that is a case subtype primary or a case subtype secondary is also a transaction case
